title: Pacaltsdorp United fails to qualify for nationals
description: CRICKET NEWS - The SWD Premier League...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The SWD Premier League champions, Pacaltsdorp United, has failed to qualify as the Western Cape representative for the Cricket South Africa national club championships that will be hosted in Pretoria later this month.

Pacaltsdorp United, 211 (all out) lost by 1 wicket against Cape Town Cricket Club (219/9) on Saturday while on Sunday they – after scoring 218 – lost by 9 wickets against the hosts, Maties (from Boland). Maties will be the Western Cape representative.


> The summarised score cards are:


Pacaltsdorp United vs Western Province CC

- PACALTSDORP UNITED 211 all out - 49,5 over (Hanno Kotze 48, Heath Richards 22, Matthew Thorne 22, Leroi Bredenkamp 21, Justin Behrens 4/17).
- WESTERN PROVINCE CC 219/9 - 47,3 overs (Justin Behrens 78, J Allie 40,
- Bailey Aarons 35*, Heath Richards 4/22)
- Western Province CC won by 1 wicket.

Maties vs Pacaltsdorp United

- PACALTSDORP UNITED 218 all out - 48,5 overs (Franco Geldenhuys 55, Leroi Bredenkamp 49, Pieter Stuurman 40, Lehan Botha 39/3, Ryan Jairaj 3/49, Anda Dilima 2/34, Salmaan Ajam 2/39)
- MATIES 118/1 - 24,2 overs
- (David Christie 56*, Gysbert Wege 43*, Duren Felix 1/30)
- Maties won by 9 wickets on D/L method.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
